reviews.text:
Where do we even start?!

Patrick, Alex, Alec, and Becca from PHOCO were fabulous! Patrick and his team met and exceeded our photography and videography needs. We would highly recommend PHOCO for not only their attention to detail but also for their professionalism and their creative ideas.

We get teary-eyed every time we look at the photographs and have already started planning on how we will frame many of them! Our family and friends are still raving about how dreamy the pictures are and how the attention to the wedding details portrays photography shots for a magazine. We are so excited to see the video, and have NO DOUBT that it will be just as amazing as the photographs. 🌼

The PHOCO team captured many magical, memorable moments of our wedding, family, and friends. Every person we worked with was kind, professional, and creative. I felt so beautiful on my wedding day, and his team even made sure my train looked great in every photo!!

Thank you for making our dreams come to life!
Clair and Jonathan Bagwell

(Just a preview of how beautiful the photos are 🥲 )

When we thought about our wedding photographer, we knew we wanted someone who was not only incredibly skilled but also easy and chill to be around. We were looking for candid moments and real emotion rather than stiff, staged smiles, and since we’d be spending most of the day with this person, the energy had to feel right—especially for two people who are a bit camera-awkward!

Patrick was everything we hoped for and more. He was professional, personable, and most of all, chill—the perfect balance of present without ever being intrusive. He truly understood what we wanted (and what we didn’t want): authentic, vibrant photos that captured the spirit of our community without pulling us away from actually experiencing our wedding.

We feel so lucky to have benefitted not only from his immense talent as a photographer but also from his understanding of events and his local connections. Thanks to Patrick, we now have a collection of images that feel alive, joyful, and exactly true to the day.

Patrick truly went above and beyond for my wedding. He provided expert advice for sequencing and flow during picture time, but made sure we knew he was good with whatever we chose to do. He did a great job learning our families' dynamics and navigated any potential family drama like a pro. He made the extended family photo time extra fun with lots of jokes and laughter. I can't speak highly enough on my experience with Patrick and PHOCO and would 1000% recommend to anyone looking for an event photographer.

PHOCO is incredible!  We hired them to capture our wedding and engagement photos (July 2016) and we could not be any happier with the decision.  They are so talented, friendly, easy to work with (they make you feel comfortable!), timely, and creative!  They captured moments on our wedding day that we will forever cherish.  Patrick and his team are true professionals and handled every last one of our requests.  Their passion for what they do is inspiring - even staying all the way through our "send-off" on our wedding night; solely because they wanted to make sure they captured our entire celebration for us.  Go PHOCO for your special event and you will be so thrilled with your experience!

Patrick and Shaye photographed our wedding and the results were absolutely amazing! We loved working with them and our photos came out better than we could have ever hoped! I would definitely recommend PHOCO to anyone who is looking for a photographer!
